description_long: This hammer features a large, rectangular metallic head with intricate geometric engravings on all visible faces, giving it a decorative and robust appearance. The head is solid and appears to be made of a heavy, silvery metal, with a slightly darker tone on the engraved surfaces. The handle is cylindrical, straight, and wrapped in a textured, reddish-brown material, likely leather or a synthetic grip, providing enhanced hold and comfort. The base of the handle is capped with a metallic, angular pommel that matches the ornate style of the head. The overall design is reminiscent of a ceremonial or fantasy hammer, with a focus on both function and visual impact. No visible signs of wear, branding, or additional attachments are present, and the hammer appears pristine and well-crafted.
description: A large, ornate hammer with a metallic, engraved head and a straight, textured reddish-brown handle capped with a matching metal pommel. The design is robust and decorative, with no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat striking face of the engraved metallic head and the full length of the textured handle ending in a decorative pommel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular profile of the hammer head, the detailed engravings, and the straight, grippy handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back face of the hammer head with geometric patterns and the narrow end of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the other side of the engraved head and the handle's length.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle wrapped in textured reddish-brown leather or synthetic grip, capped with a decorative metallic pommel.
attribute_head_type: Large rectangular sledge-type head with flat striking faces and intricate geometric engravings on all sides.
